description: Composition: 100% CottonCare: Machine Wash separately in cold water, use mild detergent. Do not Bleach. Avoid Soaking. Remove promptly. Line Dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only. Do Not Iron Directly on Print/embroidery.Fitting: Slim FitA crew neck long sleeved red  t-shirt that looks great on all guys. Not too slim, not too loose, this t-shirt's fit is just perfect. This T-shirt suits semi-formal trousers and leisurewear denim jeans, khaki effortlessly. Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
